text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English. In this podcast, we have real conversations in Easy English to help you learn.
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》。在这个播客节目中,我们用简单英语进行真实对话,帮助大家学习。

text: I'm Neil. And I'm Georgie. You can watch a video version of this podcast and
zh: 我是Neil。我是Georgie。你可以观看这个播客的视频版本,

text: find a free worksheet to help you learn. Go to bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 还能找到免费的学习讲义。请访问bbclearningenglish.com。

text: Hi Georgie. You're looking very summery today. today? Yes, well that is because I'm going on my summer holiday tomorrow.
zh: 嗨,Georgie。你今天看起来很有夏日气息啊。是啊,因为我明天就要去度暑假了。

text: Well, that's exciting and very useful because we're talking about summer plans today.
zh: 太好了,而且很应景,因为我们今天正好要聊聊暑期计划。

text: It's summer in the UK at the moment, which is a time when people are often busy.
zh: 英国现在是夏天,这段时间大家通常都很忙。

text: So Georgie, you're going on holiday. Tell me more about that.
zh: 那Georgie,你要去度假了,跟我多说说吧。

text: So I'm at an age now where lots of my friends are getting married, so I have a few weddings this year
zh: 我现在这个年纪,身边很多朋友都在结婚,所以今年我要参加好几场婚礼。

text: but something that's quite traditional before a wedding is for the bride or the groom
zh: 婚礼前有个挺传统的习俗,就是新娘或新郎

text: to have like a celebration this could be a party
zh: 会办一个庆祝活动,可能是个派对,

text: or more recently it's become quite common to have a weekend away with a lot of their friends so that's what I'm doing
zh: 但最近更流行的是和一大群朋友出去玩一个周末,我这次就是这样。

text: this weekend and that's what it's called a hen party for a woman or a stag party for a man in the UK
zh: 这个周末我就要去,在英国,这种活动女生叫“hen party”,男生叫“stag party”。

text: I think in the US it's different. A bachelor party.
zh: 我记得在美国叫法不太一样,叫“bachelor party”(单身派对)。

text: Yes. What about you, Neil? What are you up to this summer? Well, we're not going away.
zh: 是的。那你呢,Neil?你这个夏天打算做什么?我们不出去旅行。

text: We're staying in the UK, but that's OK for me because the weather is actually nice in the summer here, usually.
zh: 我们会留在英国,不过对我来说也挺好,因为英国夏天的天气其实通常还不错。

text: So we might do some day trips, go to the beach,
zh: 所以我们可能会安排一些一日游,比如去海边,

text: maybe a bit of camping with the kids and then go on our proper holiday in October.
zh: 再带孩子们去露营一下,然后十月份再去真正的度假。

text: That sounds nice. So if you're not going on holiday,
zh: 听起来不错。那如果你不出去度假的话,

text: do you have any goals, like things you want to complete or get done during the summer?
zh: 你有没有什么目标,比如夏天想完成或做到的事情?

text: Well, I have a garden and it always needs things doing to it.
zh: 我有个花园,总有各种事情要打理。

text: But actually, the only thing I really do is mow the lawn, cut the grass using that machine called a lawnmower.
zh: 不过说实话,我唯一常做的就是修剪草坪,用那种叫割草机的机器割草。

text: I seem to do that a lot in the summer. How about you, Georgie? Have you got any goals or plans, things you want to do over the summer?
zh: 我感觉夏天总在做这件事。你呢,Georgie?你有什么夏天想做的目标或计划吗?

text: So, I don't have a garden at my flat, but we do have a roof terrace.
zh: 我公寓没有花园,但我们有个屋顶露台。

text: And at the moment, it looks pretty disgusting.
zh: 现在它看起来挺糟糕的。

text: It's not in a very good state. So, my housemates and I want to clean that up a little bit.
zh: 状态不太好,所以我和室友们打算把它清理一下。

text: And we're also planning to buy some outdoor furniture, maybe even a barbecue.
zh: 我们还打算买一些户外家具,甚至可能买个烧烤架。

text: Wow, that sounds good. Do you like DIY when you have to build and make things?
zh: 哇,听起来不错。你喜欢自己动手做手工、组装东西吗?

text: It's not my favourite thing, to be honest. I think I'm a bit too lazy for it.
zh: 说实话,不是我特别喜欢的事,我觉得自己有点懒。

text: But if there's a goal and something nice that we'll have at the end, then I'll do it.
zh: 不过如果最后能有个不错的成果,那我还是愿意去做的。

text: Why not? I love to barbecue in the summer. Do you?
zh: 那当然啦。我夏天特别喜欢烧烤。你呢?

text: Yeah. What do you like to put on the barbecue? Well, all kinds of things.
zh: 我也喜欢。你烧烤的时候喜欢放什么食材?各种各样的都有。

text: So people often think about burgers and sausages, but I like to do some other things.
zh: 大家通常会想到汉堡和香肠,但我喜欢做点别的。

text: Quite a lot of fish. I like to grill fish on the
zh: 我经常烤鱼,

text: barbecue. Oh, you're making me hungry. It's nearly lunchtime.
zh: 很喜欢在烧烤时烤鱼。哦,你说得我都饿了,快到午饭时间了。

text: Yeah. And something that you can't do in the UK
zh: 是啊。而且有件事,在英国冬天做不到,

text: in the winter, which you can do in the summer, which i love is stay out late in the evening because it's light right now
zh: 但夏天可以做,我特别喜欢,就是晚上可以在外面待到很晚,因为现在天黑得很晚,

text: it's light until almost 10 o 'clock at night so i like barbecuing in the summer georgie is there anything that you do or like doing
zh: 几乎到晚上十点天还亮着,所以我夏天特别喜欢烧烤。Georgie,你有没有什么事,

text: in the summer that you can't do other times of year hmm good
zh: 是只有夏天才能做,其他季节做不到的?嗯,好问题。

text: question um yes i really like going on picnics with friends and i actually did that last week
zh: 有的,我很喜欢和朋友去野餐,上周我就去了,

text: with some and friends. So you just buy lots of
zh: 和几个朋友一起。你们就是去店里买点小零食,

text: small snacks from the shop or you can cook stuff, I guess, and bring it.
zh: 或者也可以自己做点吃的带过去,

text: You find a park and then sit and eat with friends, maybe play some music.
zh: 找个公园,坐下来和朋友一起吃东西,可能还放点音乐。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we heard in this conversation, starting with the
zh: 我们来回顾一下这次对话中出现的词汇,先从这个

text: question, what are you up to? Which means what are you doing?
zh: 问题开始:“What are you up to?” 意思是“你在做什么?”

text: What are you up to tomorrow, Georgie? I am going to the airport
zh: 比如问Georgie:“你明天打算做什么?”我明天要去机场。

text: tomorrow. We've also had DIY, which is short for do it yourself, and it means tasks around the house like painting or building
zh: 我们还听到了DIY,这是“do it yourself”(自己动手做)的缩写,指的是家里的一些活儿,比如刷漆或组装家具。

text: furniture. For example, I'm going to do some DIY on my roof terrace this summer.
zh: 比如:“今年夏天我打算在屋顶露台上做点DIY。”

text: We've heard barbecue. Now, a barbecue is an outdoor grill for cooking on, but it's also the name of the meal
zh: 我们还听到了barbecue(烧烤)。barbecue既可以指用来烤肉的户外烤架,也可以指烤出来的食物,

text: that you cook on the barbecue or the event or party that you have with barbecued food.
zh: 或者指那种以烧烤食物为主的聚会或派对。

text: A picnic is when you take food to an outdoor space like a park or the beach. You usually sit on a blanket and eat on the ground.
zh: picnic(野餐)是指带着食物去户外的地方,比如公园或海滩,通常铺一块毯子坐在地上吃东西。

text: And we heard mow the lawn and that means cutting the grass with a lawnmower.
zh: 我们还听到了“mow the lawn”,意思是用割草机修剪草坪。

text: And that's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 这一期《Real Easy English》就到这里。

text: Now test the vocabulary you've learnt using the worksheet on our website.
zh: 现在就用我们网站上的讲义,来测试一下你学到的这些词汇吧。

text: Find it in the links below this episode or visit bbclearningenglish .com. Goodbye!
zh: 链接就在本期节目下方,或者访问bbclearningenglish.com。再见!
